titleStmt.title: SII 26.465: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 465. (A.R. No. 442 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Muṇdīśvaramuḍaiyār temple.

p.hi: Māṛaº Vīra Pāṇḍya (?): Kollam 616, Āṉi 4, śu. 11, Wednesday, Svātī = 1441 A.D. May 31.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 100 paṇam for a nandā lamp to be burnt in the temple of the god Mūṉṟiśvaramuḍaiyār of Ambalattāḍinallūr alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍu in the north-east quarter of Śrivallavaṉmaṅgalam, a brahmadēśam in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam, by a trustee of the temple named Māttāṇḍaṉ-Perumāṉ alias Villavarāyar. The gift money was accepted by Śrīkailāyamuḍaiyāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ Aṉavaratadānapperumāḷ, Tirunelvēliuḍaiyār, Veṟṟikkuvēleḍuttaperumāḷ Irāśākumāra-bhaṭṭaṉ and Peṟṟaperumāḷ-Aṟamvaḷatār the dēvakaṉmis of the 30 circles belonging to the temple. These persons had agreed to burn the lamp hereditarily out of the interest on the gift money.
At the end of the record, besides the above mentioned people, Mūṉrīśura Mūppaṉ and Nāṇambi Ayyaṉ Villavarāya Āśāri, the siṟpi (sculptor) of the village, also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kollam 6 100 10 6 varuṣam Āṉi mātam 4 § purvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum putaṉvāramum peṟṟa cotināḷ kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmadeśam śrīvallavaṉmaṅkalattu vaṭakiḻ piṭākai Ampala
ttāṭinallūrāṉa maṇappaṭaivīṭṭil Uṭaiyanāyiṉār koyilil muppatu vaṭṭattil Amanta devakaṉmikaḷil śrī kaiylāya muṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ
Aṉavarata tāṉapperumāḷum meṟpaṭi tirunelveli Uṭaiyārum veṟṟikkuvel Eṭutta perumāḷ Irācakumārapaṭṭaṉum peṟṟaperumāḷaṟamvaḷattārum kenti- śvaramuṭaiyā taṉmakattā
māttāṇṭaṉ perumāṉāṉa villavarāyaṟku piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Iṟṟaināḷ Ivar Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku tirunantāviḷakkukku tanta ø100 Ippaṇam nūṟṟukkum Itil Uḷḷa palicai koṇṭu
nāḷ Oṉṟukku Iṭṭapotum tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟu Itu cantirātittavaṟ cellac cantati praveśame Intat tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟum muṭṭuvarāmal kaṇkāṇippaṭiye naṭattappotum
paṭi kaṟpittu piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkalluveṭṭi kuṭuttamaikku Ippaṭikku śrīkailāya muṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉ Aṉavaratatāṉapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku meṟpaṭi
tirunelveli Uṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku veṟṟikkuveleṭuttaperumāḷ Irācakumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aṟamvaḷattār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku muṉṟicuṟamuppaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivvūril ciṟpikaḷil nāṇampiayyaṉ villavarāya Ācāri Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.465 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
